step1.title: 1. Choose your dates
step1.body: Tell us when you need the car and where in South Florida you'll be picking up.

step2.title: 2. Pick your vehicle
step2.body: Browse our live fleet and reserve the exact car that fits your trip and budget.

step3.title: 3. Pickup & drive
step3.body: Meet us at your spot — Fort Lauderdale, Miami, or FLL airport. Quick handoff, full tank ready.

step4.title: 4. Drive supported
step4.body: Direct line to our team the whole rental. Easy returns, clear communication, no surprises.

meta.title: How It Works | Easy Car Rental Booking | Rent With Heldy
meta.description: See how renting a car with Rent With Heldy works — search availability, choose your vehicle, confirm online, and meet us for pickup in Fort Lauderdale or Miami.

hero.title: How booking with Heldy works
hero.subtitle: A simple, transparent rental process from search to return. Built for South Florida visitors and locals who want a real alternative to corporate rental counters.

step1.heading: 1. Find your dates and vehicle
step1.body: Tap Book Now anywhere on the site to open the live booking widget. Select your pickup and return dates, and you'll see exactly which vehicles are available — with real photos, real categories, and the actual price for your trip. No bait-and-switch, no "or similar" surprises.

step2.heading: 2. Reserve in minutes
step2.body: Pick the car you want and complete checkout. Reservations are confirmed instantly — you'll get an email with your booking details right away. The vehicle is then held exclusively for your dates.

step3.heading: 3. Coordinate pickup with our team
step3.body: After booking, our team will reach out directly to confirm pickup location and timing. We meet at convenient spots in Fort Lauderdale, Miami, or near FLL airport. If you're flying in, share your flight number and we'll plan around your arrival — including delays.

step4.heading: 4. Quick handoff and you're driving
step4.body: At pickup we verify your license, walk the car together, hand over the keys, and you're on your way. Most handoffs take just a few minutes. You'll have our team's direct number for the entire rental — no 1-800 lines, no script-reading agents.

step5.heading: 5. Easy return
step5.body: Return the vehicle at the agreed time and location. We're flexible within reason on early or late returns — just give us a heads up. Need to extend? Message early; if the car isn't already booked next, we'll keep you in it.

pickup.heading: What you'll need at pickup
items: A valid driver's license (international licenses welcome with passport).
A credit card in the renter's name.
Proof of insurance or an active protection plan via the booking platform.

finalCta.title: Ready to book your South Florida rental?
finalCta.subtitle: Reserve in minutes. Premium fleet. Real-person service from pickup to return.
